text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you! You were pretty good, Trainer!

text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you! You were pretty good, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you had just a little more sense for distance,
you could've gotten even more!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But you still looked super cool trying so hard like
that! ♪
